prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-WDNSPOONS-4PC-FBA Product Type: SPOON Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 4pc Small Bamboo Wooden Spoons Kitchen Utensils Cooking Baking Supplies 7.5 Inches Description: Set of four bamboo wooden spoons from Beille are smaller in scale, measuring 7.5 inches in length, making them excellent complementary kitchen utensils to the standard larger cooking spoons we’re all used to using. We love them for tasting, serving and finishing in the kitchen whether for cooking, baking or food and meal prep.

These 4pc bamboo utensils wooden spoons from Beille will stand up to lots of wear and tear in your kitchen! The smaller length of 7.5 inches of the bamboo spoons, makes them easy to handle, quick to wash, useful for hard to reach spots, and are also great for little helping hands in the kitchen too!

Bamboo is a natural, biodegradable and more renewable resource, making it an environmentally responsible material choice for your kitchen. In addition, these Beille bamboo cooking utensils wooden spoons are manufactured from a single piece of bamboo wood, not constructed of laminated pieces, making them free of harmful glues or other chemicals. The finished bamboo wooden spoons will not scratch cookware and are great for cooking with non stick pots and pans.

The bamboo utensils wooden spoons are top rack dishwasher safe BUT, handwashing is recommended to increase longevity; wash wooden spoons with warm water and gentle dish soap and air dry for best results. Search Terms: bamboo wooden spoons restaurant cooking baking supplies meal food prep serving coffee tasting spoon kitchen utensils gadgets home decor pantry house warming gifts new home chef cookware bakeware mothers day gifts sustainable products wedding gifts Features: - 4PC BAMBOO WOODEN SPOONS: Set of four bamboo wooden spoons from Beille are smaller in scale, measuring 7.5 inches in length; We love them for tasting, serving and finishing in the kitchen whether for cooking, baking or food and meal prep - FOOD SAFE COOKING SPOONS: Manufactured from a single piece of bamboo wood, not constructed of laminated pieces, making these wooden spoons free of harmful glues or other chemicals; finished bamboo wooden spoons will not scratch cookware and are great for cooking with non stick pans - DURABLE BAMBOO MATERIAL: Lightweight but incredibly strong and durable, these Beille bamboo wooden spoons will stand up to all the wear and tear in your kitchen - DISHWASHER SAFE SPOONS: These spoons are top rack dishwasher safe but handwashing is recommended to increase longevity; wash wooden spoons with warm water and gentle dish soap and air dry - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 7.5 x 3 x 0.25 inches; Product Weight: 0.15lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 4-pc Small Bamboo Wooden Spoons 7.5 Inches

anthropic.title_differentiation: Set Of 4, Food Safe, Dishwasher Safe, Single-Piece Bamboo, Non-Scratch, Eco-Friendly, Kitchen Utensils

openai.title_differentiation: 4 Piece Set, Single Piece Bamboo, Non Scratch, Dishwasher Safe, 75 Inch Mini Utensils, Food Safe, Tasting And Serving
